nasb.text: and he said with a loud voice, “Fear God, and give Him glory, because the hour of His judgment has come; worship Him who made the heaven and the earth and sea and springs of waters.”

esv.text: And he said with a loud voice, “Fear God and give him glory, because the hour of his judgment has come, and worship him who made heaven and earth, the sea and the springs of water.”

cnv.text: 他大聲說：“應當敬畏　神，把榮耀歸給他！因為他審判的時候到了，應當敬拜創造天、地、海和眾水泉源的那一位！”

ccb.text: 他大声说：“当敬畏上帝，归荣耀给祂，因为祂审判的时候到了。要敬拜造天、地、海和一切水源的那位。”

csbs.text: 他大声说：“你们当敬畏神，把荣耀归给他，因为他审判的时候到了。你们当敬拜造了天、地、海和众水泉源的那一位。”
